fields.name: Product Name
fields.help_text: Please enter the product name. Note: Please avoid adding product features such as weight. dimension, price description here.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:
This is the normal/regular price at which you sell on Meesho. This price shall be lower than the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the Product. Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.
Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:
Enter the price at which you want to sell this product on Meesho app
Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.22 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the importers’ address.

fields.name: Color
fields.help_text: Select "Color" from the list

fields.name: Fabric
fields.help_text: Select "Fabric" from the list

fields.name: Fit/Shape
fields.help_text: Select "Fit/Shape" from the list

fields.name: Generic Name
fields.help_text: Generic Name means the commonly used name through which a product is generally called/known. Generic name DOES NOT MEAN the name of the brand or manufacturer of the product or its use.

fields.name: Neck
fields.help_text: Select "Neck" from the list

fields.name: Net Quantity (N)
fields.help_text:
Net Quantity means total number of units in the product. If the product is a multi- pack, please mention the total number of units in the multi-pack.
For example- if you are selling t-shirts in a multi-pack of 4, please specify 4.

fields.name: Image 2

fields.name: Product ID / Style ID
fields.help_text: Style Code is an alphanumeric code which is given to a product and can be found on the tag or packaging. Style Code remains the same for all Size variants and changes for all Color variants. For example, a red colored product that comes in three different sizes will have the same Style Code.

fields.name: SKU ID
fields.help_text: Seller SKU ID is a unique ID for each product variation. This ID is created by seller which helps them to identify their products on Meesho. This ID will be shown in the inventory tab, orders tab, order label and invoices.

fields.name: Brand Name
fields.help_text: Enter the Brand name

fields.name: Group ID
fields.help_text: Enter same group ID for the products which should be grouped in a single catalog on Meesho app.

fields.name: Product Description
fields.help_text: Please write few lines describing your product

fields.name: EAN/UPC
fields.help_text: EAN is a 13 digit bar code required by brands. In case you have UPC, prefix 0 to make it 13 digits. EAN/UPC is limited to 13 characters (including spaces). If not applicable, Please leave it blank.

fields.name: CM/L Number
fields.help_text:
This is a unique number given to a specific manufacturing unit or factory by the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS). Please add the 7-10 digit registration number next to CM/L or R on the product or on the product packaging.
This information will be available on the product/packaging label for pre-packed products. Please enter the same value as in the product/ packaging.

fields.name: IS Number
fields.help_text:
It is a number given by the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) to products that meet certain safety and quality standards. Please add the number next to IS mentioned on the product or on the product packaging.
This information will be available on the product/packaging label for pre-packed products. Please enter the same value as in the product/ packaging.

fields.name: Product ID / Style ID
fields.help_text: Style Code is an alphanumeric code which is given to a product and can be found on the tag or packaging. Style Code remains the same for all Size variants and changes for all Color variants. For example, a red colored product that comes in three different sizes will have the same Style Code.

fields.name: SKU ID
fields.help_text: Seller SKU ID is a unique ID for each product variation. This ID is created by seller which helps them to identify their products on Meesho. This ID will be shown in the inventory tab, orders tab, order label and invoices.

fields.name: Brand Name
fields.help_text: Enter the Brand name

fields.name: Group ID
fields.help_text: Enter same group ID for the products which should be grouped in a single catalog on Meesho app.

fields.name: Product Description
fields.help_text: Please write few lines describing your product

fields.name: Ankle Height
fields.help_text: Select "Ankle Height" from the list

fields.name: Brand
fields.help_text: Select "Brand" from the list
enum_values: Action Action Eva Action Eva Flotter

fields.name: CM/L Number
fields.help_text:
This is a unique number given to a specific manufacturing unit or factory by the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS). Please add the 7-10 digit registration number next to CM/L or R on the product or on the product packaging.
This information will be available on the product/packaging label for pre-packed products. Please enter the same value as in the product/ packaging.

fields.name: Fastening & Back Detail
fields.help_text: Select "Fastening & Back Detail" from the list

fields.name: IS Number
fields.help_text:
It is a number given by the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) to products that meet certain safety and quality standards. Please add the number next to IS mentioned on the product or on the product packaging.
This information will be available on the product/packaging label for pre-packed products. Please enter the same value as in the product/ packaging.

fields.name: Originals
fields.help_text: Select "Originals" from the list

fields.name: Product Name
fields.help_text: Please enter the product name. Note: Please avoid adding product features such as weight. dimension, price description here.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:
This is the normal/regular price at which you sell on Meesho. This price shall be lower than the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the Product. Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.
Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:
Enter the price at which you want to sell this product on Meesho app
Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.34 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: CM/L Number
fields.help_text:
This is a unique number given to a specific manufacturing unit or factory by the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS). Please add the 7-10 digit registration number next to CM/L or R on the product or on the product packaging.

fields.name: IS Number
fields.help_text:
It is a number given by the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) to products that meet certain safety and quality standards. Please add the number next to IS mentioned on the product or on the product packaging.

fields.name: Product Name
fields.help_text: Please enter the product name. Note: Please avoid adding product features such as weight. dimension, price description here.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:
This is the normal/regular price at which you sell on Meesho. This price shall be lower than the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the Product. Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.
Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:
Enter the price at which you want to sell this product on Meesho app
Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.22 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.help_text: Select "Sleeve Length" from the list

fields.name: Surface Styling
fields.help_text: Select "Surface Styling" from the list

fields.name: Chest Size
fields.help_text: Select "Chest Size" from the list (Inch)

fields.name: Hip Size
fields.help_text: Select "Hip Size" from the list (Inch)

fields.name: Waist Size
fields.help_text: Select "Waist Size" from the list (Inch)

fields.name: Product Name
fields.help_text: Please enter the product name. Note: Please avoid adding product features such as weight. dimension, price description here.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:
This is the normal/regular price at which you sell on Meesho. This price shall be lower than the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the Product. Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.
Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:
Enter the price at which you want to sell this product on Meesho app
Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.26 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the importers’ address.

fields.name: Color
fields.help_text: Select "Color" from the list

fields.name: Fabric
fields.help_text: Select "Fabric" from the list

fields.name: Generic Name
fields.help_text: Generic Name means the commonly used name through which a product is generally called/known. Generic name DOES NOT MEAN the name of the brand or manufacturer of the product or its use.

fields.name: Net Quantity (N)
fields.help_text:
Net Quantity means total number of units in the product. If the product is a multi- pack, please mention the total number of units in the multi-pack.
For example- if you are selling t-shirts in a multi-pack of 4, please specify 4.

fields.name: Length Size
fields.help_text: Select "Length Size" from the list (Inch)

fields.name: Waist Size
fields.help_text: Select "Waist Size" from the list (Inch)

fields.name: Image 1 (Front)
fields.help_text: Click on Images Bulk Upload on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please don't add GOOGLE DRIVE links to avoid QC error

fields.name: Image 2
fields.help_text: Click on 'Image link Generator' on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please note that google drive links will not be accepted

fields.name: Image 3
fields.help_text: Click on 'Image link Generator' on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please note that google drive links will not be accepted

fields.name: Image 4
fields.help_text: Click on 'Image link Generator' on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please note that google drive links will not be accepted

fields.name: Product ID / Style ID
fields.help_text: Style Code is an alphanumeric code which is given to a product and can be found on the tag or packaging. Style Code remains the same for all Size variants and changes for all Color variants. For example, a red colored product that comes in three different sizes will have the same Style Code.

fields.name: SKU ID
fields.help_text: Seller SKU ID is a unique ID for each product variation. This ID is created by seller which helps them to identify their products on Meesho. This ID will be shown in the inventory tab, orders tab, order label and invoices.

fields.name: Brand Name
fields.help_text: Enter the Brand name

fields.name: Group ID
fields.help_text: Enter same group ID for the products which should be grouped in a single catalog on Meesho app.

fields.name: Product Description
fields.help_text: Please write few lines describing your product

fields.name: EAN/UPC
fields.help_text: EAN is a 13 digit bar code required by brands. In case you have UPC, prefix 0 to make it 13 digits. EAN/UPC is limited to 13 characters (including spaces). If not applicable, Please leave it blank.

fields.help_text: Generic Name means the commonly used name through which a product is generally called/known. Generic name DOES NOT MEAN the name of the brand or manufacturer of the product or its use.

fields.name: Material
fields.help_text: Select "Material" from the list

fields.name: Net Quantity (N)
fields.help_text:
Net Quantity means total number of units in the product. If the product is a multi- pack, please mention the total number of units in the multi-pack.
For example- if you are selling t-shirts in a multi-pack of 4, please specify 4.

fields.name: Product Dimension Unit
fields.help_text: Select the unit in which you have have entered the dimension of the product. For example: Beds maybe measured in ft, TV screens maybe be measure in inch.

fields.name: Product Height
fields.help_text:
Enter height/depth/thickness of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the height/thickness of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the depth of the product.

fields.name: Product Length
fields.help_text:
Enter length of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the length of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the diameter of the product. Example of correct product length 50

fields.name: Product Width
fields.help_text:
Enter width of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the width of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the width of the product.

fields.name: Season
fields.help_text: Select "Season" from the list

fields.name: Type
fields.help_text: Select "Type" from the list
enum_values: Cap with Face Cover/ Balaclava cap

fields.name: Image 1 (Front)
fields.help_text: Click on Images Bulk Upload on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please don't add GOOGLE DRIVE links to avoid QC error

fields.name: Image 2
fields.help_text: Click on 'Image link Generator' on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please note that google drive links will not be accepted

fields.name: Image 4

fields.name: Product ID / Style ID
fields.help_text: Style Code is an alphanumeric code which is given to a product and can be found on the tag or packaging. Style Code remains the same for all Size variants and changes for all Color variants. For example, a red colored product that comes in three different sizes will have the same Style Code.

fields.name: SKU ID
fields.help_text: Seller SKU ID is a unique ID for each product variation. This ID is created by seller which helps them to identify their products on Meesho. This ID will be shown in the inventory tab, orders tab, order label and invoices.

fields.name: Brand Name
fields.help_text: Enter the Brand name

fields.name: Group ID
fields.help_text: Enter same group ID for the products which should be grouped in a single catalog on Meesho app.

fields.name: Product Description
fields.help_text: Please write few lines describing your product

fields.name: Brand
fields.help_text: Select "Brand" from the list

fields.name: Pattern
fields.help_text: Select "Pattern" from the list

fields.name: Product Name
fields.help_text: Please enter the product name. Note: Please avoid adding product features such as weight. dimension, price description here.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:
This is the normal/regular price at which you sell on Meesho. This price shall be lower than the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the Product. Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.
Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:
Enter the price at which you want to sell this product on Meesho app
Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.12 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. fields.name: Color
fields.help_text: Select "Color" from the list

fields.name: Fabric
fields.help_text: Select "Fabric" from the list

fields.name: Generic Name
fields.help_text: Generic Name means the commonly used name through which a product is generally called/known. Generic name DOES NOT MEAN the name of the brand or manufacturer of the product or its use.

fields.name: Net Quantity (N)
fields.help_text:
Net Quantity means total number of units in the product. If the product is a multi- pack, please mention the total number of units in the multi-pack.
For example- if you are selling t-shirts in a multi-pack of 4, please specify 4.

fields.name: Product Dimension Unit
fields.help_text: Select the unit in which you have have entered the dimension of the product. For example: Beds maybe measured in ft, TV screens maybe be measure in inch.

fields.name: Product Height
fields.help_text:
Enter height/depth/thickness of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the height/thickness of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the depth of the product.

fields.name: Product Length
fields.help_text:
Enter length of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the length of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the diameter of the product. Example of correct product length 50

fields.name: Product Width
fields.help_text:
Enter width of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the width of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the width of the product.

fields.name: Image 2

Style Code remains the same for all Size variants and changes for all Color variants. For example, a red colored product that comes in three different sizes will have the same Style Code.

fields.name: SKU ID
fields.help_text: Seller SKU ID is a unique ID for each product variation. This ID is created by seller which helps them to identify their products on Meesho. This ID will be shown in the inventory tab, orders tab, order label and invoices.

fields.name: Type
fields.help_text: Select "Type" from the list

fields.name: Product Name
fields.help_text: Please enter the product name. Note: Please avoid adding product features such as weight. dimension, price description here.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price

fields.name: Product ID / Style ID
fields.help_text: Style Code is an alphanumeric code which is given to a product and can be found on the tag or packaging. Style Code remains the same for all Size variants and changes for all Color variants. For example, a red colored product that comes in three different sizes will have the same Style Code.

fields.name: SKU ID
fields.help_text: Seller SKU ID is a unique ID for each product variation. This ID is created by seller which helps them to identify their products on Meesho. This ID will be shown in the inventory tab, orders tab, order label and invoices.

fields.name: Product Name
fields.help_text: Please enter the product name. Note: Please avoid adding product features such as weight. dimension, price description here.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:
This is the normal/regular price at which you sell on Meesho. This price shall be lower than the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the Product. Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.
Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:
Enter the price at which you want to sell this product on Meesho app
Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.38 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. fields.name: Importer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the importers’ address.

Enter length of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the length of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the diameter of the product. Example of correct product length 50

fields.name: Product Width

fields.name: Product Name

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:
This is the normal/regular price at which you sell on Meesho. This price shall be lower than the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the Product. Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.
Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:
Enter the price at which you want to sell this product on Meesho app
Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.34 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Address

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:

Recommend entering Rs.21 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

Enter width of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the width of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the width of the product.

fields.name: Shape
fields.help_text: Select "Shape" from the list

fields.name: Type
fields.help_text: Select "Type" from the list

fields.name: Image 1 (Front)
fields.help_text: Click on Images Bulk Upload on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please don't add GOOGLE DRIVE links to avoid QC error

fields.name: Image 2
fields.help_text: Click on 'Image link Generator' on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please note that google drive links will not be accepted

fields.name: Image 3
fields.help_text: Click on 'Image link Generator' on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please note that google drive links will not be accepted

fields.name: Image 4
fields.help_text: Click on 'Image link Generator' on the supplier panel to create the image links. Please note that google drive links will not be accepted

fields.name: Product ID / Style ID
fields.help_text: Style Code is an alphanumeric code which is given to a product and can be found on the tag or packaging. Style Code remains the same for all Size variants and changes for all Color variants. For example, a red colored product that comes in three different sizes will have the same Style Code.

fields.name: SKU ID
fields.help_text: Seller SKU ID is a unique ID for each product variation. This ID is created by seller which helps them to identify their products on Meesho. This ID will be shown in the inventory tab, orders tab, order label and invoices.

fields.name: Brand Name
fields.help_text: Enter the Brand name

fields.name: Group ID
fields.help_text: Enter same group ID for the products which should be grouped in a single catalog on Meesho app.

fields.name: Product Description
fields.help_text: Please write few lines describing your product

fields.name: Brand
fields.help_text: Select "Brand" from the list
enum_values: COLOUR MUSIC - ENJOY YOUR LIFE WITH MUSIC

fields.name: Occasion
fields.help_text: Select "Occasion" from the list

fields.name: Warranty
fields.help_text:
A warranty is a promise from a seller or manufacturer that a product will work properly for a certain period of time. If the product breaks or does not function as expected during that time, the manufacturer will fix or replace the product, usually at no extra cost.
Warranty period is the time for which such a warranty is provided for the product.
For example, if your product comes with 6 months warranty, please select 6 months from the drop down.

fields.name: Product Name
fields.help_text: Please enter the product name. Note: Please avoid adding product features such as weight. dimension, price description here.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:
This is the normal/regular price at which you sell on Meesho. This price shall be lower than the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the Product. Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.
Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:
Enter the price at which you want to sell this product on Meesho app
Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.20 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. fields.name: Importer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the importers’ address.

Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.25 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the importers’ address.

fields.name: Generic Name
fields.help_text: Generic Name means the commonly used name through which a product is generally called/known. Generic name DOES NOT MEAN the name of the brand or manufacturer of the product or its use.

fields.name: Net Quantity (N)
fields.help_text:
Net Quantity means total number of units in the product. If the product is a multi- pack, please mention the total number of units in the multi-pack.
For example- if you are selling t-shirts in a multi-pack of 4, please specify 4.

fields.name: Product ID / Style ID
fields.help_text: Style Code is an alphanumeric code which is given to a product and can be found on the tag or packaging. Style Code remains the same for all Size variants and changes for all Color variants. For example, a red colored product that comes in three different sizes will have the same Style Code.

fields.name: SKU ID
fields.help_text: Seller SKU ID is a unique ID for each product variation. This ID is created by seller which helps them to identify their products on Meesho. This ID will be shown in the inventory tab, orders tab, order label and invoices.

fields.name: Brand Name
fields.help_text: Enter the Brand name

fields.name: Group ID
fields.help_text: Enter same group ID for the products which should be grouped in a single catalog on Meesho app.

fields.name: Product Description
fields.help_text: Please write few lines describing your product

fields.name: EAN/UPC
fields.help_text: EAN is a 13 digit bar code required by brands. In case you have UPC, prefix 0 to make it 13 digits. EAN/UPC is limited to 13 characters (including spaces). If not applicable, Please leave it blank.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Product ID / Style ID
fields.help_text: Style Code is an alphanumeric code which is given to a product and can be found on the tag or packaging. Style Code remains the same for all Size variants and changes for all Color variants. For example, a red colored product that comes in three different sizes will have the same Style Code.

fields.name: SKU ID
fields.help_text: Seller SKU ID is a unique ID for each product variation. This ID is created by seller which helps them to identify their products on Meesho. This ID will be shown in the inventory tab, orders tab, order label and invoices.

fields.name: Brand Name
fields.help_text: Enter the Brand name

fields.name: Group ID
fields.help_text: Enter same group ID for the products which should be grouped in a single catalog on Meesho app.

fields.name: Product Description
fields.help_text: Please write few lines describing your product

fields.name: EAN/UPC
fields.help_text: EAN is a 13 digit bar code required by brands. In case you have UPC, prefix 0 to make it 13 digits. EAN/UPC is limited to 13 characters (including spaces). If not applicable, Please leave it blank.

fields.name: Product Name
fields.help_text: Please enter the product name. Note: Please avoid adding product features such as weight. dimension, price description here.

fields.name: Variation
fields.help_text: Depending upon the size that your product is available in please select the relevant size and fill in the necessary information. Example: Clothing comes in XS, S, M,L,XL,XXL etc according to body type Footwear comes in 37, 38, 39 according to foot size Beddings come in king, queen or single according to bed size, etc. If the relevant size for your product is not available in the drop down, please select Free Size.

fields.name: Meesho Price
fields.help_text:
This is the normal/regular price at which you sell on Meesho. This price shall be lower than the Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the Product. Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.
Customers buying at this price will be able to return products for all reasons.

fields.name: Wrong/Defective Returns Price
fields.help_text:
Enter the price at which you want to sell this product on Meesho app
Customers buying at this price can only return wrong/defective delivered items. Check all applicable return reasons in 'Return Reasons' sheet
Recommend entering Rs.12 lower than Meesho Price, based on reverse shipping & handling cost savings

fields.name: MRP
fields.help_text: “MRP” stands for “Maximum Retail Price”. It's the highest price that a seller is allowed to sell a product for including taxes, charges added on the basic price of the product. No seller can sell a product for a price higher than MRP. Acceptable in INR ONLY. This information is generally available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the MRP as per the explanation above.

fields.name: Net Weight (gms)
fields.help_text: Means the total weight of the product excluding the packaging weight, in grams (g). This information is available on the packaging label for pre-packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please check the weight of the product excluding any external packing and provide such information in SI Unit - grams.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.help_text: Number of items you have in stock.

fields.name: Country of Origin
fields.help_text: Country of Origin means the country in which the product has been produced/assembled. This information is available on the packaging label for pre- packed products. If you are not listing a pre-packed product, please provide the country in which the product is manufactured.

fields.name: Manufacturer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd.  If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the complete address of the Manufacturer which means the entity which has produced the product. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “manufactured by” on the label. In the address, please specify the street, village/ town/ district along with the name of the state. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for producing your product.

fields.name: Manufacturer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the manufacturers’ address.

fields.name: Packer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. Manufacturer name may look like: ABC Appliances Pvt. Ltd. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Address
fields.help_text: Enter the address of the Packer which generally means the entity which has packed the product. Packer details can generally be found on the label of the product. Find “Packed by” or “Pkd” on the label. In case your product does not have this information, provide the details of the packer of your product. In many cases, the manufacturer and packer may be the same.

fields.name: Packer Pincode
fields.help_text: Enter the pincode mentioned in the packers’ address.

fields.name: Importer Name
fields.help_text: Enter the name of the Importer which means the entity which has imported the product from any other country into India for sale in India. This information is generally available on the packaging label of the product. Find “imported by” on the label. If this information is not available on the label of your product or your product does not have a label, provide the details of the entity/person who is responsible for importing your product.

fields.name: Importer Address

fields.name: Product Height
fields.help_text:
Enter height/depth/thickness of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the height/thickness of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the depth of the product.

fields.name: Product Length
fields.help_text:
Enter length of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the length of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the diameter of the product. Example of correct product length 50

fields.name: Product Width
fields.help_text:
Enter width of the product.
Example: If you are listing a square/rectangular/oblong product with edges, please measure and add the width of the product. If you are selling a circular/round shaped product, please measure and add the width of the product.
